rationale: User explicitly requested 'medium' intensity. Independent analysis supports 'medium': (1) content is moderate-length marketing copy (~280 words) with 3 image-text combinations, (2) 15 atomic claims spanning opinion, factual, and definitional types but no statistical claims, (3) only 2 institutional attributions (brand itself and shopping mall), (4) 6 affected groups with 5 polarization axes around gender roles, fan culture, and brand values, (5) moderate domain sensitivity -- not high-risk like food safety or law enforcement but touches on sensitive cultural values around motherhood and family, (6) 11 emotional hooks. The content would rate 'low' on volume alone but the cultural sensitivity around redefining motherhood, the inclusion of fan culture and同人 culture elements, and the brand-as-institution dimension elevate it to 'medium'.
